problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
